title: Minimal Additions
description: A lightweight content modpack for playing with friends who are mod-phobic.
body:
This modpack is designed for those who enjoy mods to play with friends who dislike anything other than the vanilla experience. The modpack features plenty of quality of life mods, plenty of performance enhancing mods, but only a few content mods (the main one being Create). The main mods include:

* EMI for recipie viewing
* Xaero's minimap + map for waypoints and chunk loading
* Do a barrel roll for funny elytra tricks
* Chipped for extra building blocks
* Create for redstone-esqe tech mod enjoyers.
* In-game proximity voice chat that affects things in the world (like the Warden!)
